[Index](../index.md) / [Models](../index.md#models) / `Team`

# 🗃️ Team <kbd>Model</kbd>

> A team groups users within an organization for project collaboration.

**Category:** Identity · **Since:** 1.0 · **Defined in:** `showcase.zmodel`

---

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>showcase.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
model Team with Timestamps {
    id             String         @id @default(cuid())
    name           String         @length(1, 80)
    description    String?
    organization   Organization   @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
    organizationId String
    members        TeamMember[]
    projects       Project[]

    @@allow('read', true)
    @@allow('create,update,delete', members?[role == 'ADMIN' || role == 'OWNER'])
    @@meta('doc:category', 'Identity')
    @@meta('doc:since', '1.0')
}
```

</details>

> **On this page:** [Mixins](#mixins) · [Fields](#fields) · [Relationships](#relationships) · [Access Policies](#access-policies) · [Validation Rules](#validation-rules)
